Surname.jp: 自然を愛でる森の番人

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.\nGrants <color=#28d9ed>Snow</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Lily</color> <color=#28d9ed>Increased Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【スノー】と【リリィ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>스노우, 릴리</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。\n且使<color=#28d9ed>雪诺、莉莉</color>的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nGrants <color=#28d9ed>Snow</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Lily</color> increased <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\n<color=#28d9ed>【スノー】と【リリィ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>스노우, 릴리</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。且使<color=#28d9ed>雪诺、莉莉</color>的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> on a single target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nGrants <color=#28d9ed>Snow</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Lily</color> increased <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、選択した対象単体に<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n<color=#28d9ed>【スノー】と【リリィ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 선택한 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 부여합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>스노우, 릴리</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并对1名所选目标造成<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n且使<color=#28d9ed>雪诺、莉莉</color>的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> when the caster gains a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得するたびに、味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득할 때마다 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每当自身获得回合时,使友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升\n<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
